projects.name: bba-mac-private
projects.description: EPBotWrapper — Native macOS Bridge Bidding Engine

releases.message: v2.2.0 — Finder alias drag-target in macOS .dmg
Port AuctionPrefix and MeaningExtended to Rust bba-server
Accept AuctionPrefix to force the start of an auction
BBA: add bridge-classroom.com/.org to CORS allow list
Use AllPass/PassOut format in auction logs
Log readable auction format, display timestamps in local timezone
Update docs for droplet deployment, explicit CORS headers, archive Windows-era docs
Add X-Client-Info tracking (extension/browser/OS), dashboard environment tab, user status badges, sortable columns, new/recurring stacked charts
Use :filename path param syntax for Axum route compatibility
Dashboard: user/scenario summaries, sortable columns, ConnectInfo fix

Version 0.8.7.1 SuitClib for Linux added Updated BEN_HOME for BBA'support Better validation of opening lead for samples Updated BEN-exe to select right server and board Added explanations of bids to the BUI Added opponents to BENGUI Added limit on server to prevent mususage Added explanation for Human bids Fixed error with hand52to32 using 24 card deck Change play reward for NN to handle IMP and MP

Version: 0.8.6.12 Using SuitC to count tricks in each suit New methods for SuitC Added setting for bba_trust Ignore probability if bad samples bot now split in bidder, opening lead and cardplayer Added check on GF sequence Changed check on late penalty doubles Reduced quality, when bidding is backtracked to find samples Added Bridge Moniteur start button Setting BM as default TM for table_manager_client Updated validation of lead
Updates to the Table Manager Client GUI
Minor bug-fixes Three new GUI-applications New contract model Build for MvsM
Add the ability to parse handviewer links into LIN files (#24)
Fixed a bug in the practice tool that caused headers to be written to the csv in append mode (#22)
Add tools to compare contracts and create practice deals (#18)
relaxed dict writer. add new fields to csv. (#17)
Improvements to help parse vugraph project (#13)
Update Readme.md withe examples. Minor fixes for release 0.0.6 (#1)
fix: Add generate keyword to grammar, preventing condition clobbering
Update release workflow to use action-gh-release
Statistics UI improvements and EDGAR Defense path discovery
Update release workflow to match existing Dealer3 secret names
Increase card border stroke-width for print visibility
Fix formatting to pass CI cargo fmt check
Move patch config to .cargo/config.toml for local dev only
Improve bidding sheet practice page context text
Fix two-column auction row logic when second player opens
Add render_boards API for library consumers
Fix image loss when adding headers/footers to PDFs with XObject references
v0.2.0: Fix headers/footers on Google Docs PDFs
Fix glyph width being encoded even if glyph parsing fails
